title: Berries and More
description: Adds new types of berries and foods
body:
# Requirements
The following mods are mandatory. Mod loaders other than Forge are not supported.

- Silent Lib
- Forge

# Introduction

Berries and More adds a few new berry bushes which spawn in specific biomes. The berries you pick from them (as well as vanilla Sweet Berries) can be used to craft various new food items.

# Berries

### _Acerola Berries_

![](https://imgur.com/kams2Y0.png)

These **red** berries are found in **savanna** biomes.

### _Seaberries_

![](https://imgur.com/frQqpta.png)

These **orange** berries are found in **mountain** and **hill** biomes.

### _Snowberries_

![](https://imgur.com/AHKgdfw.png)

These **white** berries are found in *plains** biomes.

### _Scorch Berries_

![](https://imgur.com/7NcmKeX.png)

These **light blue** berries are found in **the Nether**. They can grow on netherrack in addition to normal soils.

### _Void Berries_

![](https://imgur.com/GwbzzFs.png)

These **dark purple** berries are found in **the End**. They can grow on end stone in addition to normal soils.

# Foods

### Berries

All of the berries can be eaten as they are and some restore more hunger than others.

### Juice

Berry juices restore more hunger than plain berries, but have no special effects.

### Pie

Berry pies restore more hunger than juices and berries, but have no special effects.

### Tea

Berry teas restore some hunger and give an additional beneficial effect 100% of the time. The effect depends on the berry.

### Wine
Berry wines restore some hunger and have a variety of potential effects, most of which are negative. Each berry has one unique effect, which may or may not be helpful.
